exercises.name: Kettlebell Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, maintain a safe back by holding a slightly arched or neutral spine throughout. 

2) Grab the kettlebell and pull it to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blade and flexing the elbow. 

3) Lower and Repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Bottoms Up Press
exercises.alternateName: single arm bottoms up shoulder press
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell upside down by the handle. 

Press it overhead while engaging your core and maintaining balance. 

This targets shoulders, arms, and core stability.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Bottoms Up Walking Hold
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell upside down by the handle. 

Engage your core and maintain balance while keeping the kettlebell steady. 

This strengthens grip, shoulders, and engages the core.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean and Jerk
exercises.alternateName: Double KB clean and Jerk Press
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in each hand between your feet with your arms straight.

2.Thrust your hips forward pulling the kettlebells straight up, catching them at shoulder height, dipping at the hips and knees slightly.

3.Quickly press the kettlebells overhead splitting your feet to absorb them at the top.

4.Return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
exercises.alternateName: double KB clean and shoulder press
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in each hand between your feet with your arms straight.

2.Thrust your hips forward pulling the kettlebells straight up, catching them at shoulder height, dipping at the hips and knees slightly.

3.Quickly push the kettlebells overhead, extending your arms and legs fully.

4.Return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean to Jump Switch
exercises.description:
Start in a split stance with the kettlebell in the hand opposite your forward leg. 

Hinge slightly at the hips and engage your core. In one explosive motion, clean the kettlebell to shoulder height while simultaneously jumping and switching legs mid-air. 

Land softly in a split stance with the opposite leg forward, holding the kettlebell at shoulder height on the same side as the new forward leg. 

Repeat continuously, maintaining control and stability throughout the movement.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean, Squat and Press
exercises.alternateName: KB Double Clean Squat Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in each hand at your shins with your arms straight.

2.Thrust your hips forward and pull the kettlebells straight up, catch them at shoulder height, dipping at the hips and knees.

3.Quickly push the kettlebells overhead, extending your arms and legs fully.

4.Bring the kettlebells at shoulder height, then return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Contralateral Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.alternateName: Kettlebell Rear Foot Elevated Split Squat Contralateral
exercises.description:
Place one foot on a bench or elevated surface, holding a kettlebell in the opposite hand. 

Lower into a split squat, focusing on form and control.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Contralateral Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a dumbbell in one hand while performing a curtsy lunge, stepping the opposite leg behind the other. 

Keep your chest lifted as you lower into the lunge, then return to standing.

Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Contralateral Kickstand Deadlift
exercises.alternateName: KB b-stance, split stance, deadlift single arm single leg
exercises.description:
With a kettlebell in one hand, balance on one leg while using the other foot as a kickstand for support. 

Hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell, and return to standing.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in front of your chest and step one leg behind the other in a curtsy motion. 

Keep your chest upright and your core tight as you lower into the lunge. 

Return to standing and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Curtsy to Clean
exercises.description:
Stand tall holding a kettlebell at chest level in the hand on the same side as the leg you’ll step back. 

Step that leg diagonally behind you into a curtsey lunge, bending both knees while keeping your chest upright. Push through the front heel to return to standing and simultaneously perform a clean, bringing the kettlebell from your side to shoulder height. 

Lower the kettlebell back to chest level and repeat continuously.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Curtsy to Lateral Lunge with Clean
exercises.alternateName: Kettlebell Curtsey to side Lunge with Clean
exercises.description:
Stand tall holding a kettlebell at chest level in the hand on the same side as the leg you’ll step back. Step that leg diagonally behind you into a curtsey lunge, bending both knees while keeping your chest upright. 

Push through the front heel to return to center, then immediately step that same leg out to the side into a lateral lunge. 

As you lower into the lateral lunge, perform a clean by bringing the kettlebell from your side to shoulder height. Return to standing and repeat continuously.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift to Upright Row
exercises.description:
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands. Hinge at your hips and lower the kettlebell toward the floor, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent (deadlift). 

As you return to standing by driving your hips forward, pull the kettlebell upward toward your chest in an upright row, leading with your elbows. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position and repeat continuously.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Racked Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in the front rack position (near your shoulder) and step one leg behind in a curtsy lunge. 

Alternate legs while maintaining a strong posture.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Double Racked Step Up
exercises.description:
Hold two kettlebells in the rack position (near your shoulders). 

Step onto a platform with one foot, then bring the other foot up to meet it. 

Step down with the same foot. Targets legs, glutes, and balance.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Figure 8
exercises.description:
1) Place one kettlebell between your legs and take a comfortable stance. 

2) Bend over by pushing your butt out and keeping your back flat. 

3) Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to your other hand between your legs. 

4) Go back and forth for several repetitions.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Floor Press
exercises.description:
1.Lie on the floor holding kettlebells at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and your palms facing up.

2.Press the kettlebells straight up over your chest, arms straight.

3.Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level, returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Forward Alternating Lunge to Halo
exercises.description:
Stand tall holding a kettlebell at chest level. Step forward into a forward lunge, bending both knees until the front thigh is parallel to the floor and the rear knee hovers above the ground. 

Push through the front heel to return to standing, then move the kettlebell in a controlled circular motion around your head (halo) in one direction.

Repeat continuously, alternating legs with each lunge.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Forward Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides. Step forward into a lunge, bending both knees. 

Push back to starting position. This targets quads, hamstrings, and glutes.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Forward Lunge with Halo
exercises.description:
Stand tall holding a kettlebell at chest level. Step forward into a forward lunge, bending both knees until the front thigh is parallel to the floor and the rear knee hovers above the ground. 

While in the lunge position, move the kettlebell in a controlled circular motion around your head (halo). Push through the front heel to return to standing, then repeat

exercises.name: Kettlebell Glute Bridge
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor, holding a kettlebell with both hands resting on your hips. 

Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling, forming a straight line from your shoulders to your knees. 

Squeeze your glutes at the top, then slowly lower your hips back to the floor and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Alternating Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a dumbbell or kettlebell at chest height. 

Step one leg behind the other, bending both knees to perform a curtsy lunge. 

Push back to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Skater Squat
exercises.alternateName: Kettlebell goblet single leg balance squat
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in a goblet position at chest height. 

Perform a single-leg squat while keeping the kettlebell close and extending the other leg behind you. 

Drive through the standing leg to return to standing.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Slider Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Hold a kettlebell in a goblet position and use a slider under one foot to perform a lateral lunge, keeping the chest lifted and core engaged.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
exercises.description:
1)  When performing the squat, ensure that your feet are set shoulder-width apart. 

2) As you descend into the squat, make sure your toes, knees, and hips maintain alignment. 

3) As you sit back, make sure your body weight shifts into your heels. 

4) Keep your chest and upper body held in a neutral position or with a slight arch.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Straddle Squat
exercises.description: Hold a kettlebell in a goblet position, squat down with feet wide apart, keeping your chest lifted and knees tracking over your toes.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Gorilla Alternating Row
exercises.description: Place kettlebells between your feet. Hinge at the hips and alternately row each kettlebell toward your chest.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Gorilla Single Arm Row
exercises.description: Hinge at the hips with a kettlebell between your feet. Row one kettlebell at a time toward your chest.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Half Kneeling Bottom Up Press
exercises.alternateName: single arm bottoms up shoulder press
exercises.description:
Kneel on one knee while holding a kettlebell upside down by the handle. 

Press the kettlebell overhead. 

This strengthens the shoulders and engages the core.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Half Kneeling Overhead Press
exercises.description:
Kneel with one knee on the ground and the other foot in front. 

Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, then press overhead. Lower and repeat. 

This targets shoulders and core while improving stability.

exercises.name: Kettlebell High Pull
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in both hands between your feet with your arms straight.

2.Extend your hips and raise the kettlebell up to just below your chin, keeping your elbows high. Keep the kettlebell close to your body.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Ipsilateral Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.alternateName: Kettlebell Rear Foot Elevated Split Squat Ipsilateral
exercises.description:
Place one foot on a bench or elevated surface, holding a kettlebell in the same hand as the rear foot. 

Perform a split squat, maintaining stability.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Ipsilateral Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a dumbbell or kettlebell in the hand of the same side as the leg stepping behind in the curtsy lunge. 

Lower into the lunge and return to standing, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Ipsilateral Kickstand Deadlift
exercises.alternateName: KB b-stance, split stance, deadlift single arm single leg
exercises.description:
Perform a deadlift with one leg in a kickstand position, holding the kettlebell in the same hand. 

Lower the kettlebell and return to standing while keeping your back

exercises.name: Kettlebell Ipsilateral Step Up
exercises.description:
Holding a dumbbell or kettlebell in one hand, step up onto a bench or box with one leg. 

Press through the heel of the stepping leg to lift the body up, then step down and alternate legs.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Kickstand Deadlift
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand with your feet hip-width apart. 

Shift your weight to one leg, hinge at the hips, and lower the kettlebells toward the ground. 

This targets the hamstrings, glutes, and lower back.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Kickstand Deadlift
exercises.description:
Stand with one leg in a kickstand position while holding a kettlebell in the opposite hand. 

Lower the kettlebell towards the ground while keeping your back straight, then return to standing.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Kickstand Good Morning
exercises.alternateName: KB split stance, b-stance good morning
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand. Stand with one foot forward and the other foot behind you. 

Hinge forward at the hips while maintaining a neutral spine. 

This targets the hamstrings, glutes, and lower back.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Kickstand Squat
exercises.description:
Stand with one foot forward and the other foot lightly touching the floor behind you. Hold a kettlebell in each hand, and squat down on the front leg, keeping your chest upright. 

This focuses on the quads, glutes, and improves balance.
